biography: Tommy, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a steady and considered approach to the competition. Representing Espoo Ringside Golf, Tommy's presence is always marked by his thoughtful demeanor and meticulous attention to detail on the course.

While the coveted Hector Trophée and the individual Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Tommy has participated in the event 3 times, demonstrating a commitment to the unique challenges and camaraderie that the tournament offers.

Known for his strategic play and unwavering focus, Tommy is a respected competitor. Although not currently slated to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his dedication to the sport leaves open the possibility of a future return. Tommy's past performances suggest that he is always one to watch, ready to leverage his experience and tactical acumen.
